RT @OakFoSho: Hats off to @BellaEiko for speaking #truth to power! #OccupyOakland #OO #OWS #p21
#occupyoakland #oaklandcitycouncil What is happening right now? … I mean, I get it but I don't GET it…
@BellaEiko Thank you! Thank you! Thank you for speaking tonight... I was moved, and you said all of things that needed to be say. Thank you.
Thank you thank you thank you thank you thank you to this woman.
I am really incredibly grateful that this is the first woman to speak on Occupy Oakland. Probably the best thing that could have happened.

It needs to be as easy for an individual to secure their privacy as it is for the government to invade it
If you aren’t doing everything differently from the way you did it in 2016 you haven’t learned your lesson – if you can’t figure it out, sit back and let someone else try something new

So many people saw 2016 and thought “woah! we did not expect or plan for this at all” and then they were like “okay now we know this can happen though so we will carry on in exactly the same way with that knowledge and now I have no more blind spots”
